W

WATER_PRISON - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.ModBlocks
Water Prison Block.
WATER_PRISON_ENTITY - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.entity.ModEntities
Water Prison Block Entity Type.
WATER_WAND - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.ModItems
Water Wand.
WaterPrisonBlock - Class in com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom
Represents a magical water prison block that traps and slows entities caught inside it.
WaterPrisonBlock(BlockBehaviour.Properties) - Constructor for class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom.WaterPrisonBlock
Constructs a new WaterPrisonBlock with the specified behavior properties.
WaterPrisonBlockEntity - Class in com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.entity.custom
Represents the block entity logic for the WaterPrisonBlock.
WaterPrisonBlockEntity(BlockPos, BlockState) - Constructor for class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.entity.custom.WaterPrisonBlockEntity
Constructs a new WaterPrisonBlockEntity at the given position and state.
WaterWandItem - Class in com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.custom
Represents a magical wand that creates a spherical water prison in front of the player.
WaterWandItem(Item.Properties) - Constructor for class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.custom.WaterWandItem
Constructs a new WaterWandItem with the given properties.
